workItem.title: Isolate malformed historical run projections during startup reconciliation
workItem.body:

The client returned invalid_game_api_run_projection and abandoned all later repositories, leaving closed Symphony runs 20 through 23 marked running.","dependencies":[],"expectedOutcome":"One malformed historical run projection is reported and skipped without preventing valid runs or later repositories from reconciling; provider, authentication and transport failures remain fatal to the cycle.","kind":"issue","operationId":"create_symphony_invalid_run_isolation_20260721","outOfScope":["Delete or rewrite the malformed historical ledger record","Ignore provider failures","Access GitHub directly from Symphony"],"parentIssueNumber":null,"risk":"high","scope":["Treat only structurally incomplete individual run projections as skippable records","Continue reconciliation within the repository and across later repositories","Return a structured skipped result identifying the invalid run without inventing issue identity","Preserve fail-fast behavior for provider, authentication, rate-limit and transport errors","Prove live Symphony runs 20 through 23 become terminal after restart"],"status":"ready","title":"Isolate malformed historical run projections during startup reconciliation"} -->

## Context

Exact live startup acceptance reached bos-mcp before Symphony and stopped on run_bos_mcp_4_runtime_probe_20260721, which has a chain projection but no run manifest. The client returned invalid_game_api_run_projection and abandoned all later repositories, leaving closed Symphony runs 20 through 23 marked running.

## Expected outcome

One malformed historical run projection is reported and skipped without preventing valid runs or later repositories from reconciling; provider, authentication and transport failures remain fatal to the cycle.

## Scope

- Treat only structurally incomplete individual run projections as skippable records
- Continue reconciliation within the repository and across later repositories
- Return a structured skipped result identifying the invalid run without inventing issue identity
- Preserve fail-fast behavior for provider, authentication, rate-limit and transport errors
- Prove live Symphony runs 20 through 23 become terminal after restart

## Out of scope

- Delete or rewrite the malformed historical ledger record
- Ignore provider failures
- Access GitHub directly from Symphony

## Acceptance criteria

- A missing issueNumber or runId on one list-runs record yields a structured skipped result
- Valid records after the malformed record are still reconciled
- Repositories after the affected repository are still reconciled
- Provider and transport errors still stop the cycle and activate existing cooldown behavior
- Closed Symphony Issues 20 through 23 expose terminal AgentRun projections without duplicate terminal events
- The complete Symphony gate passes with 100 percent coverage and zero Credo or Dialyzer findings
